name: Strawberry Citrus Charlotte
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over orange juice.
2. In a saucepan, whisk together 3/4 cup sugar, lemon and orange rind, lemon juice, and eggs. Cook over medium heat, whisking continually for about 4 minutes or until thickened. Remove from heat.
3. Whisk the gelatin until dissolved and cool, whisking occasionally, for about 1 1/2 hours or until room temperature.
4. Whip cream separately.
5. In a separate large bowl, beat together quark, yogurt, and remaining 1/2 cup sugar. Gradually beat in cooled citrus mixture until smooth. Fold in whipped cream. Refrigerate, stirring a few times, for 30 minutes or until thickened but not set.
6. Line the sides of a 9 inch springform pan with waxed paper, extending 2 inches above the top. Trim ladyfingers to the height of the pan and arrange around the sides of the pan, cutting ends down. Line the bottom of the pan with the remaining lady fingers.
7. Spoon the cream mixture into the pan.
8. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight. Up to 4 hours before serving, arrange berries on top. In a saucepan, melt jelly with 1 teaspoon water and brush over the berries.
